# ערן שומרון יועצים — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A B2B-focused business targeting low-tech industry owners, factory operators, and traditional industrial businesses. The brand serves a practical, results-driven audience that values reliability, efficiency, and straightforward solutions over high-tech complexity. The tone is professional and grounded, appealing to hands-on business owners in manufacturing and industrial sectors.

## How to Contact Us

- Email: miri@e-effective.co.il
- Phone: +972-50-5912360
- Phone (tel): tel:+972505912360
- Address: תוצרת הארץ 3 - BSR CITY, פתח תקווה, בניין Y, קומה 4

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `business` (text)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ערן שומרון יועצים
A B2B-focused business targeting low-tech industry owners, factory operators, and traditional industrial businesses. The brand serves a practical, results-driven audience that values reliability, efficiency, and straightforward solutions over high-tech complexity. The tone is professional and grounded, appealing to hands-on business owners in manufacturing and industrial sectors.

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים מתחום הלואו טק, מפעלים, תעשייה
- בעלי עסקים לואו-טק
- מנהלי מפעלים תעשייתיים
- מנהיגי תעשייה מסורתית

## Industry
שירותים לעסקים (B2B)

---
